name: broken tackles from plays attributes via bc_pid and trg_pid
description: Regression: nfl_plays.mbt is populated on rush plays (attributed via bc_pid) AND on completed receptions (attributed via trg_pid -- the receiver who broke tackles after the catch). Previously player_broken_tackles_from_plays declared `pid_columns: ['bc_pid']`, so receiving broken tackles were silently dropped from RB and WR totals. This fixture pins the new dual-pid attribution: the broken_tackles_from_plays CTE must group by COALESCE(nfl_plays.bc_pid, nfl_plays.trg_pid) so a play's mbt count flows to whichever role the play row carries.
expected_query: with "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid) as pid, SUM(mbt) as broken_tackles_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2025) group by COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid)), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2025]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."broken_tackles_from_plays" AS "broken_tackles_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288" on "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.pos IN ('RB', 'WR', 'TE') group by "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."broken_tackles_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 20
